name: bluetooth-adapters

metadata.name: bluetooth-adapters
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tools to enumerate and find Bluetooth Adapters

documentation:
# Bluetooth Adapters

Tools to enumerate and find Bluetooth Adapters ## Installation Install this via pip (or your favourite package manager): `pip install bluetooth-adapters` ## Contributors ✨ Thanks goes to these wonderful people ([emoji key](https://allcontributors.org/docs/en/emoji-key)): This project follows the [all-contributors](https://github.com/all-contributors/all-contributors) specification. Contributions of any kind welcome! ## Credits This package was created with [Cookiecutter](https://github.com/audreyr/cookiecutter) and the [browniebroke/cookiecutter-pypackage](https://github.com/browniebroke/cookiecutter-pypackage) project template.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.util.adapter_human_name
documentation: Return a human readable name for the adapter.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.util.adapter_unique_name
documentation: Return a unique name for the adapter.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.util.adapter_model
documentation: Return a model for the adapter.

classes.name: bluetooth_adapters.adapters.BluetoothAdapters
documentation: Class for getting the bluetooth adapters on a system.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.dbus.get_bluetooth_adapters
documentation: Return a list of bluetooth adapters.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.dbus.get_bluetooth_adapter_details
documentation: Return a list of bluetooth adapter with details.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.dbus.get_dbus_managed_objects
documentation: Return a list of bluetooth adapter with details.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.dbus.is_docker_env
documentation: Return True if we run in a docker env.

classes.name: bluetooth_adapters.systems.windows.WindowsAdapters
documentation: Class for getting the bluetooth adapters on a Windows system.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.history.load_history_from_managed_objects
documentation: Load the history from the bus.

classes.name: bluetooth_adapters.systems.macos.MacOSAdapters
documentation: Class for getting the bluetooth adapters on a MacOS system.

classes.name: bluetooth_adapters.systems.linux.LinuxAdapters
documentation: Class for getting the bluetooth adapters on a Linux system.

functions.name: bluetooth_adapters.storage.expire_stale_scanner_discovered_device_advertisement_data
documentation: Expire stale discovered device advertisement data.

classes.name: bluetooth_adapters.storage.DiscoveredDeviceAdvertisementData
documentation: Discovered device advertisement data deserialized from storage.

classes.name: bluetooth_adapters.storage.DiscoveredDeviceAdvertisementDataDict
documentation: Discovered device advertisement data dict in storage.
